title: Sr Software Engineer
description:

We work incredibly closely with the business and are especially focused on ensuring Uber's mobility business continues to grow rapidly through new product offerings and experiences! What's even more exciting is that you get to build products that change the lives of millions of people and use these products every day!

 Sometimes you have to run before you can walk" \\- Iron Man

title: Software Developer
description:
**About The Company**
 Groww is a dynamic and innovative financial services company dedicated to democratizing access to investment opportunities for every Indian. Our mission is to simplify investing by providing a seamless, user\\-friendly platform that caters to both novice and seasoned investors. With a customer\\-centric approach, we leverage cutting\\-edge technology, data\\-driven insights, and a comprehensive suite of financial products to empower millions of users across India. Our culture fosters collaboration, transparency, and continuous learning, making Groww not just a workplace but a community committed to transforming the financial landscape of the country.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Software Development Engineer to join our growing technology team. In this role, you will be instrumental in designing, developing, and maintaining scalable microservices that form the backbone of our platform. Your expertise will ensure the delivery of high\\-quality, reliable, and efficient software solutions that directly impact millions of users. You will work closely with product managers, architects, and other stakeholders to translate business requirements into technical solutions, taking end\\-to\\-end ownership of features from conception through deployment and maintenance. This position offers an exciting opportunity to contribute to a fast\\-paced environment where innovation and excellence are valued, and your work will have a tangible impact on the financial lives of millions of Indians.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate will possess a strong technical background with extensive experience in building scalable microservices and working within cloud infrastructures. A B.Tech or equivalent degree in Computer Science or related field from a reputed institution is required. You should demonstrate a solid understanding of software architecture, design patterns, data structures, and algorithms. Proven hands\\-on experience with Java and Spring is essential, along with excellent coding skills and the ability to translate designs into high\\-quality code fluently. Strong problem\\-solving capabilities, adaptability to new technologies, and a passion for building reliable systems are critical. Additionally, candidates should have 8\\-10 years of relevant experience in developing RESTful or SOAP microservices, with a focus on performance, scalability, and maintainability.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Design, develop, and maintain highly scalable and maintainable microservices that address real\\-world business problems, ensuring high performance and reliability.
* Take ownership of entire product features, including design, implementation, testing, deployment, and ongoing improvements.
* Collaborate effectively with cross\\-functional teams, including product managers, architects, and other developers, to ensure seamless sprint execution and delivery.
* Implement best practices in coding, problem\\-solving, and system design to uphold quality standards at every stage.
* Ensure robust testing and quality assurance processes are followed, including writing unit tests and participating in code reviews.
* Monitor, troubleshoot, and resolve production issues promptly, minimizing downtime and ensuring a smooth user experience.
* Mentor junior team members, sharing knowledge and fostering a culture of continuous learning and improvement.
* Stay updated with emerging technologies and industry trends, proactively adopting innovative solutions to enhance system performance and scalability.


**Benefits**
 Groww offers a comprehensive benefits package designed to support the well\\-being and professional growth of our employees. This includes competitive salary packages, performance\\-based incentives, and stock options. We provide a flexible work environment with options for remote work, along with generous paid time off and health insurance coverage. Our employees have access to continuous learning opportunities, including training programs, workshops, and conferences, to facilitate career development. Additionally, we promote a vibrant workplace culture that encourages innovation, collaboration, and recognition, ensuring every team member feels valued and motivated to excel.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Groww is an equal opportunity employer committed to fostering an inclusive environment for all employees. We celebrate diversity and do not discriminate based on race, gender, age, religion, sexual orientation, disability, or any other characteristic protected by law. We believe that diverse teams drive innovation and creativity, and we are dedicated to providing equal employment opportunities to all qualified candidates. Our hiring process is transparent and fair, focusing on skills, experience, and potential to contribute to our mission of democratizing financial services for every Indian.

title: Software Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Turing is a leading technology company dedicated to advancing artificial intelligence through innovative research and development. Renowned for its commitment to pushing the boundaries of AI capabilities, Turing specializes in building sophisticated models and datasets that enable the next generation of intelligent systems. With a global presence and a diverse team of experts, Turing is at the forefront of transforming how AI integrates into real\\-world applications, particularly in the software engineering domain. The company's mission is to empower organizations with cutting\\-edge AI solutions that enhance productivity, foster innovation, and solve complex challenges across industries.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking experienced software engineers at the tech lead level to join our dynamic team working on large language model (LLM) evaluation and training datasets. This role offers a unique opportunity to contribute to projects that focus on creating verifiable software engineering tasks based on public repository histories. The ideal candidate will possess a deep understanding of high\\-quality open\\-source repositories, particularly those hosted on GitHub, and will be responsible for hands\\-on engineering tasks that support dataset development and evaluation. Your work will directly influence the development of AI systems capable of understanding and interacting with real\\-world code, bridging the gap between software engineering and AI research.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate will have a minimum of three years of professional experience in software engineering, with a strong background in JavaScript and TypeScript. Proficiency with version control systems such as Git, containerization tools like Docker, and experience setting up and automating software pipelines are essential. Candidates should demonstrate the ability to understand and navigate complex codebases, modify and run projects locally, and evaluate code quality effectively. Experience with open\\-source contributions or evaluations is considered a plus, as is familiarity with AI or LLM research projects.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Analyze and triage issues on GitHub across trending open\\-source libraries to identify challenging tasks for LLMs.
* Set up and configure development environments, including Dockerization and environment management, to facilitate testing and evaluation.
* Assess unit test coverage and quality, ensuring datasets include diverse and representative software tasks.
* Modify and execute codebases locally to evaluate the performance of LLMs in bug fixing and code understanding scenarios.
* Collaborate closely with research teams to design and select repositories and issues that push the boundaries of current AI capabilities.
* Lead and mentor junior engineers, fostering a collaborative environment and ensuring project milestones are met efficiently.


**Benefits**
 Joining Turing provides the opportunity to work remotely within a flexible environment, allowing you to balance your professional and personal life effectively. You will be part of a pioneering team working on cutting\\-edge AI projects with some of the world's leading LLM companies. This role offers professional growth through exposure to innovative research and development processes, along with the chance to make a tangible impact on the future of AI\\-assisted software engineering. Additionally, Turing promotes a culture of continuous learning and collaboration, providing resources and support to help you excel in your career.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Turing is committed to fostering an inclusive and diverse workplace. We believe that different perspectives and backgrounds drive innovation and excellence. We provide equal employment opportunities to all qualified applicants without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, age, disability, or any other protected status. We welcome applications from individuals of all backgrounds and experiences who are passionate about advancing AI and software engineering.

description:
**The Impact You’ll Make** 




 We are seeking a highly skilled and motivated professional to join our Controls group as a Lead Embedded Engineer. As an Embedded Engineer at Lam, you will be at the forefront of innovation by designing, developing, and troubleshooting, and debugging hardware and firmware for Embedded products. This role requires a strong technical background, excellent problem\\-solving skills, and the ability to collaborate effectively with cross\\-functional teams.
 



 In this role, you’ll make an impact across Lam’s entire product portfolio of equipment working within our centralized Controls engineering team, collaborating with some of the brightest minds in the industry.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Execute design, development, verification, validation, and qualification of Embedded products owned by the Controls group.

* Proficiency in programming with Embedded C/C\\+\\+, and scripting languages such as Python.
* Hands on experience on RTL development, firmware testing using HDL languages such as Verilog and VHDL.
* Hands\\-on experience of implementing communication protocols, like EtherCAT, CAN, UART, SPI, RS‑232, RS‑422/485, Ethernet, and LonWorks.
* Strong debugging and troubleshooting skills in hardware and firmware domain.
* Hands\\-on experience in using lab test instruments for debugging and testing.
* Practical experience in hardware/software integration, testing and documentation for embedded products.



  





**Preferred Qualifications** 



* Experience in creating custom embedded Linux systems using tools like Yocto and Buildroot.
* Hands\\-on experience with version control systems like Git.
* Experience with Real\\-Time Operating Systems (RTOS) such as FreeRTOS, Linux RTOS, VxWorks, QNX, and Windows Embedded.
* Familiarity with tools like MATLAB, LabVIEW for system modeling and analysis.

* Willingness and ability to mentor team members.
* Excellent communication skills, both written and verbal.
* Strong team player with a collaborative mindset.

Develops software including operating systems, compilers, routers, networks, utilities, databases and Internet\\-related tools. Determines hardware compatibility and/or influences hardware design.

Provides expertise and partnership to functional and technical project teams and may participate in cross\\-functional initiatives. title: Senior Design Verification Engineer
description:
**Company Description**

 BITSILICA is a global leader in Semiconductor Design Services, offering end\\-to\\-end solutions from concept to silicon to software. With a strong team of over 500 engineers across India, Singapore, USA, Malaysia, and Vietnam, the company drives innovation in semiconductor and embedded software. Their expertise includes advanced SoC designs, low power design, functional verification, and embedded software development, catering to industries such as IoT, 5G, AI, and automotive. BITSILICA is dedicated to delivering cutting\\-edge solutions and ensuring superior results for complex semiconductor projects by taking complete design ownership.
   




**Role Description**

 This is a full\\-time on\\-site role for a Senior Design Verification Engineer based in Bengaluru South. The engineer will focus on ensuring the functional correctness of complex designs by developing and executing verification plans. Responsibilities include performing RTL design review, implementing test environments, conducting comprehensive functional and formal verification, and identifying and debugging design issues. The role demands collaboration with design teams to deliver high\\-quality semiconductor solutions that meet or exceed industry standards, as well as delivering technical mentorship to junior team members.
   




**Qualifications**
* Expertise in Functional Verification and Debugging techniques
* Proficiency in Formal Verification and RTL (Register Transfer Level) Design
* Strong knowledge of Computer Architecture and its application in semiconductor design
* Ability to analyze and interpret design requirements to develop robust verification strategies
* Experience with verification methodologies such as UVM/OVM and scripting languages like Python or Perl is a plus
* Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Electrical Engineering, Computer Engineering, or a related field
* Good communication and team collaboration skills, with the ability to mentor junior engineers
* Experience in the semiconductor or electronics industry is highly beneficial
